languages.text: Вы отослали меровцев перед боем с Погонщицей, не нанеся им оскорбления.
You sent the Merovians away before the fight with the Drover, without causing them offence.
languages.original_text: Вы отослали меровцев перед боем с Погонщицей, не нанеся им оскорбления.

traits.locale_text: You sent the Merovians away before the fight with the Drover, without causing them offense.
You sent the Merovians away before the fight with the Drover, without causing them offense.

You sent the Merovians away before the fight with the Drover, without causing them offence.

languages.text: Hiciste que los merovianos te dejaran antes de la lucha con el Pastor sin ofenderlos.
languages.original_text: You sent the Merovians away before the fight with the Drover, without causing them offence.

traits.locale_text: Hiciste que los merovianos te dejaran antes de la lucha con el Pastor sin ofenderlos.

languages.text: 在与拒生花开战前，你将梅罗夫人打发走，且没有得罪他们。
languages.original_text: You sent the Merovians away before the fight with the Drover, without causing them offence.

traits.locale_text: 在与拒生花开战前，你将梅罗夫人打发走，且没有得罪他们。

languages.text: Vous avez congédié les Méroviens après le combat contre le Chasseur, sans les offenser.
languages.original_text: You sent the Merovians away before the fight with the Drover, without causing them offence.

traits.locale_text: Vous avez congédié les Méroviens après le combat contre le Chasseur, sans les offenser.

languages.text: Çoban ile savaştan önce Merovluları onları gücendirmeden uzaklaştırdın.
languages.original_text: You sent the Merovians away before the fight with the Drover, without causing them offence.

traits.locale_text: Çoban ile savaştan önce Merovluları onları gücendirmeden uzaklaştırdın.

languages.text: メロヴィアンは、ドルーバーとの戦いの前に、あなたに怒らせずに去っていった。
languages.original_text: You sent the Merovians away before the fight with the Drover, without causing them offence.

traits.locale_text: メロヴィアンは、ドルーバーとの戦いの前に、あなたに怒らせずに去っていった。

languages.text: Du hast die Merovianer vor dem Kampf mit dem Treiber weggeschickt, ohne sie vor den Kopf zu stoßen.
languages.original_text: You sent the Merovians away before the fight with the Drover, without causing them offence.

traits.locale_text: Du hast die Merovianer vor dem Kampf mit dem Treiber weggeschickt, ohne sie vor den Kopf zu stoßen.
